loan_payment_date.text: วันที่จ่าย

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername ,
sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear, sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date,
sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.ref_loan_doc_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance detail_principal_bala , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period,
sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_description || decode( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code , 'KC' , ' ( ' || sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.membership_no || ' )', '' ) as item_type_description , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status ,
sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item, sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = 'BF' and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance > 0 ) or sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code <> 'BF' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '045883' --and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date = '07/06/2019'
